title: Neon Dreams
lyrics:
[Verse]
Driving through the neon night
City lights reflecting in my eyes
Synthesizers fill the air
Lost in time beyond compare

[Chorus]
Neon dreams are all I see
Electric hearts set us free
Running through the midnight glow
Letting all our colors show

title: Thunder Road
lyrics:
[Verse]
Pedal to the metal down the open road
Engine roaring louder with every mile
Nothing but the highway and the radio
Leaving all my troubles back a while

[Chorus]
Thunder road take me home
Where the wild winds blow
Thunder road I'll never slow
Till I find where I belong
